## LibraryRuntime.RuntimeProducedConfectionBase.scaleToYield() method

Scales to a new yield specification. Pushes current state to undo before change, clears redo.

Note: This method updates the yield in the confection data. Actual filling scaling must be handled at a higher level (e.g., in sessions) where the filling library is accessible.

**Signature:**

```typescript
scaleToYield(yieldSpec: Confections.IConfectionYield): Result<Confections.IConfectionYield>;
```
